title: An Act to Implement the Recommendations of the Maine Commission on Public Defense Services Regarding the Confidentiality of Attorney-Client Communications in Jails and Correctional Facilities
final_disposition: Ought Not to Pass Pursuant To Joint Rule 310, May 28, 2025
last_house_action: 4/30/2025 - Report was READ and ACCEPTED . The Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on JUDICIARY In concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
last_senate_action: 5/28/2025 - Pursuant to Joint Rule 310.3 Placed in Legislative Files (DEAD)

actions.description: Reported by Senator CARNEY of Cumberland for the Joint Standing Committee on Judiciary pursuant to the Maine Revised Statutes, Title 4, section 1804, subsection 3, paragraph H. Report READ and ACCEPTED . REFERRED to the Committee on Judiciary and ordered printed pursuant to Joint Rule 218. Ordered sent down forthwith for concurrence.
Report was READ and ACCEPTED . The Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on JUDICIARY In concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
Pursuant to Joint Rule 310.3 Placed in Legislative Files (DEAD)
